response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise, along with AWS and Kubernetes familiarity—key requirements for the role. While his background leans toward senior-level roles and includes leadership/mentorship, his adaptability and pragmatic problem-solving align well with the junior/mid-level position. The lack of direct PostgreSQL experience is offset by his SQL familiarity and relational database exposure.
strengths: Proven fullstack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Experience with AWS services (ECS, RDS, S3) and Kubernetes, matching nice-to-have qualifications
Strong software architecture skills, clean code practices, and active open-source contributions
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role, which may lead to quick turnover or dissatisfaction
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (though SQL familiarity exists)
Recent employment history shows frequent role changes, posing potential stability questions
